---
title: "Resume"
format: html
---

## 🎓 Education

**Boston University – Metropolitan College**  
*M.S. in Applied Business Analytics*  
_Expected: January 2026_

**Suffolk University**  
*B.S. in Business Administration (Global Business & Entrepreneurship)*  
_Graduated: December 2023_

---

# 🧾 Professional Summary

Data-driven business analytics professional with hands-on experience in Python, SQL, and statistical modeling. Skilled in analyzing large datasets, building predictive models, and translating complex data into actionable business insights. Proven ability to support data-informed decision-making through analytical problem-solving, data visualization, and business-focused communication.

---

## 💼 Experience Highlights

- **Lam An LLC** – Supported supply chain operations and analyzed material usage trends to improve reporting and decision-making  
- **Hang Thuan LLC** – Developed pricing strategies and managed client relationships, contributing to sales performance during market disruption  

---

## 🔬 Projects & Research

- **Salary & Compensation Trends Analysis (Python, AWS)** – Analyzed 71,000+ job records to evaluate compensation patterns and workforce trends  
- **Sales & Customer Analytics (SQL, Python)** – Analyzed 1,500+ transactions to identify revenue drivers and customer segments  
- **Housing Market Analysis (R, Random Forest)** – Built predictive models to estimate property prices and support pricing strategy  
- **MBTA System Analysis** – Identified opportunities for 10% cost reduction and 15% efficiency improvement using operational data  
- **Microbrewery Investment Analysis** – Conducted financial modeling and feasibility analysis for a $150K business investment  

(See full details on the [Projects page](projects.qmd))

---

## 💡 Skills

**Technical:** Python, SQL, R, Excel, Tableau, Power BI, Quarto, GitHub  
**Analytical:** Data Analysis, Forecasting, Statistical Modeling, Data Visualization, Business Strategy  
**Languages:** English (Fluent), Vietnamese (Fluent)

---

## 🌐 Contact

📧 Email: honganly2908@gmail.com, honganly@bu.edu 
📞 Phone: (857) 284-2121 
🔗 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/an-ly  
💻 GitHub: https://github.com/hongan2908
---
